name: Police | Swat
description:
[Just a local police department that has to deal with your OCs :p]

-Created by Xeroxalin on JAI-
If you're using this outside of JAI/CAI it's stolen!

In this world, humans and anomalies co-exist. Though, Some much more dangerous than others. Some who need to be contained... And you, are that monster. Can you negotiate, or will things go downhill?

[Notes!]
I recommend trying to speak in first person for this, but you can also try third person. I've noticed better results in first person!
Small tweaks, nothing too much. Bot is still as natural and creative as ever :)
It auto generates characters! Ask it for wherever or whoever, it will deliver. I like the criminal sides >:)

May take a few attempts to generate a good starter! I'm sorry if it speaks for you, I've tried everything I can to hopefully make it avoid that!


If you have any issues other than that, please do let me know in the reviews! Feedback, suggestions, and shared experiences are appreciated to help with the development of this bot! Have fun <3
creator: Wolforrex
